title: Canada Day fireworks in Saint John fogged up for second straight year
description: The decision to press ahead with the fireworks display upset some people who thought they should be postponed again, while others loved the effect of the fireworks in the fog.
content:
Saint Johns Canada Day fireworks were held last year on Sept. 27, more than 12 weeks late,  after the city postponed them because of dense fog and rainy weather on July 1.
It was foggy again this ye… [+2190 chars]
de: Das Feuerwerk zum Canada Day in Saint John war zum zweiten Mal in Folge beschlagen. Die Entscheidung, das Feuerwerk fortzusetzen, verärgerte einige Leute, die dachten, es sollte noch einmal verschoben werden, während andere von der Wirkung des Feuerwerks im Nebel begeistert waren.
en: Canada Day fireworks in Saint John fogged up for second straight year. The decision to press ahead with the fireworks display upset some people who thought they should be postponed again, while others loved the effect of the fireworks in the fog.
la: Dies pompa Canadae apud Sanctum Ioannem in anno secundo lineae fogged ascendit. Sententiam instare cum pompa proponere turbavit quosdam qui rursus differendum putaverunt, alii effectum pomparum nebula amaverunt.
